steps.t: Candúr can be found at a small Ranger outpost hidden in the Slag-hills. You should talk to Candúr before you depart.
Thurindol can be found at a small Ranger outpost hidden in the Slag-hills. You should talk to Thurindol.
Carchost and Skoironk are located in the Slag-hills. You should find the entrances and enter Carchost and Skoironk.
You should return to Thurindol, who can be found at a small Ranger outpost hidden in the Slag-hills.
